'''鈭歡-p-dh-h''' ('''kagapdhehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:babywear|babywear]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:babywear|babywear]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-p-dh-h
|-
! Lemma
| kagapdhehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigapdhehoko|thigapdhehoko]] || [[word:jigapdhehoko|jigapdhehoko]] || [[word:shigapdhehoko|shigapdhehoko]] || [[word:kigapdhehoko|kigapdhehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugapdhehoko|thuthugapdhehoko]] || [[word:jujugapdhehoko|jujugapdhehoko]] || [[word:shushugapdhehoko|shushugapdhehoko]] || [[word:kukugapdhehoko|kukugapdhehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
